scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n backend,bot "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:bot"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/backend && npm run build -w apps/discord-bot
scripts.start:all: concurrently -k -n backend,bot "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:bot"
scripts.release:check: npm run security:secrets && npm test && npm run build && npm run security:audit
